UAndDave.uk.title: Storage Hunters UK
UAndDave.uk.description: Ipswich: Stop - hammer time! Auctioneer Sean Kelly and his hit reality show come to the UK. A mystery object sparks a bidding war. The gang scrap for an occult bin and a coffin. S1 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Christmas Fishing
UAndDave.uk.description: Paul takes Bob and their canine friend Ted to the north of England to seek a prized English salmon - they fish the Eden and Tyne rivers in search of their elusive quarry.

UAndDave.uk.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
UAndDave.uk.description: Truck Rescue: Guy joins a multi-generational family business who rescue crashed or broken-down HGVs as he learns the physics of truck recovery and operates a crane during a complex rescue. S2 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Freddie Flintoff transforms a Sinclair C5 into a bobsleigh and tackles a terrifying Norwegian luge track, and the team try out some classic TV cop cars in an all-action police chase. S32 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Freddie, Chris and Paddy attempt to qualify as lorry drivers before embarking on a stormy HGV road trip across Britain - out on track, Chris runs the rule over the beautiful Lotus Emira. S32 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Comedians Jen Brister and Ian Moore, actor Kelvin Fletcher, and Dr Zoe Williams join the genial giant of quiz to test their general knowledge skills. S5 Ep107

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Comedians Jen Brister and Ian Moore, actor Kelvin Fletcher, and Dr Zoe Williams join the genial giant of quiz to test their general knowledge skills. S5 Ep108

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: 1960s: More homegrown fun with food as Dave and Si return to the 1960s, prepare Steak Diane and profiteroles, and discover the height of 1960s dining. S2 Ep15

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: Sheep: The Bikers focus on sheep which have provided us with milk, meat and wool for thousands of years - dishes include mechoui lamb and a hogget and barley stew. S2 Ep16

UAndDave.uk.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
UAndDave.uk.description: Simon Reeve embarks on the final leg of his journey around the Mediterranean, travelling from Morocco, across the sea to Spain, and on to Corsica and the French Riviera. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
UAndDave.uk.description: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters. S1 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Christmas Fishing
UAndDave.uk.description: Paul takes Bob and their canine friend Ted to the north of England to seek a prized English salmon - they fish the Eden and Tyne rivers in search of their elusive quarry.

UAndDave.uk.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
UAndDave.uk.description: Mountain Rescue Dog Handler: Guy loves dogs - he therefore jumps at the opportunity to become part of a dog mountain rescue team tackling dangerous terrain as a mountain rescue guide. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDave.uk.description: New. Victoria Coren Mitchell is host as actor and comedian Chris McCausland - and broadcaster and journalist Janet Street-Porter - join team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop. S69 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: QI
UAndDave.uk.description: Rude: Sandi Toksvig politely requests your company for a rather rude episode with Alan Davies, John Barrowman, Aisling Bea and Phill Jupitus. S18 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Mock the Week
UAndDave.uk.description: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis run through the main talking points of recent history with the support of guests Ed Byrne, Rhys James, Athena Kugblenu, Laura Lexx and Alasdair Beckett-King. S20 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.title: Mock the Week
UAndDave.uk.description: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis pan through recent history and extract nuggets of comedy gold with guests Maisie Adam, Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Glenn Moore and Evelyn Mok. S20 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.title: Live at the Apollo
UAndDave.uk.description: Liverpudlian comedian Chris McCausland hosts this episode of the cutting-edge comedy series and welcomes comedians Sophie Duker and Emmanuel Sonubi to the stage. S16 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDave.uk.description: Greats: The exalted quiz show! Jo Brand, David Mitchell, Sean Lock and Alan Davies grapple with greats including eminent host Stephen Fry and his superior line in questions. S7 Ep10

UAndDave.uk.title: Schitt's Creek
UAndDave.uk.description: Estate Sale: More comedy from TV's most interestingly-named town. Johnny and Moira go to an estate sale, Mutt gives Alexis a bike, and Roland asks for David's help with a special shop. S2 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Schitt's Creek
UAndDave.uk.description: Bob's Bagels: Another edition of the stupendous sitcom. Johnny convinces himself to go into business with Bob, David has an interview at a clothing store, and Moira takes care of Alexis. S2 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.title: Schitt's Creek
UAndDave.uk.description: Moira vs Town Council: Eccentrically excellent comedy. Moira bids to beautify the town, David misuses the company credit card, and Alexis and Mutt are forced to question their relationship. S2 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.title: Schitt's Creek
UAndDave.uk.description: The Candidate: The continuing antics of the down-on-their-luck Rose family. Johnny considers running for town council, David and Stevie look for love, and Alexis copes with being single. S2 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: More than 130 packets of cocaine are found hidden in the seats of a bus, a car explodes in the middle of the bridge, and a retiring officer makes his final bust. S5 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: Officers discover fentanyl hidden in the backseat of a car, and two elderly sisters are caught trying to smuggle more than 600 tramadol pills. S5 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Speed with Guy Martin
UAndDave.uk.description: Human-Powered Boat: The motoring fan attempts to beat the speed record for a human-powered boat with help from Olympians Sir Chris Hoy and Sir Ben Ainslie. S3 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
UAndDave.uk.description: Cadiz: Rick's series of culinary city breaks continues with a trip to the historic city of Cadiz in southern Spain, which is renowned for its fresh tuna and manzanilla. S1 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A man wanted for serious sexual offences is apprehended in Progreso, and agents intercept a group of migrants moments after they cross the Rio Grande river. S6 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: Officers in Hidalgo seize over 200 kilos of methamphetamine concealed in a car, and the hunt is on in Detroit for invasive insects which could destroy the US timber industry. S6 Ep9

UAndDave.uk.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
UAndDave.uk.description: Bolivia: Funny men Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke find that their high-altitude road trip in South America is no joke as they grapple with Bolivian bandits and the Road of Death! S3 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Opinionated motoring news, views and features with Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond. The lads pay homage to British Leyland and put some vintage BL models to the test. S10 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Formula 1 star Lewis Hamilton joins Jeremy Clarkson and his fellow petrolheads for the motoring show that packs a real punch. Vauxhall's VXR8 gets a spin on the test track. S10 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
UAndDave.uk.description: Thailand - Bangkok and the Central Plains: The fabulous biker boys arrive in Thailand, discovering why Bangkok is the street food capital of the world. S1 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.description: Cadiz: Rick's series of culinary city breaks continues with a trip to the historic city of Cadiz in southern Spain, which is renowned for its fresh tuna and manzanilla. S1 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Former winners Yasmine Akram, Stephen Mangan, Ingrid Oliver and Tom Rosenthal return to the best-selling author's tests of ingenuity and try to become a Champion of Champions. S6 Ep51

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: The Pointless co-host invites Ade Adepitan, Jean Johansson, Stephen Mangan and Vikki Stone to test their general knowledge skills on his not-so-pointless game show. S4 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: New: Will & Ralf Should Know Better
UAndDave.uk.description: Hobbies: Will and Ralf take hobby-hunting to extremes with ice-cold swims, full-frontal art classes, and cosplaying as cowboys in the most unlikely of places. S2 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.description: Greats: The exalted quiz show! Jo Brand, David Mitchell, Sean Lock and Alan Davies grapple with greats including eminent host Stephen Fry and his superior line in questions. S7 Ep10

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Gallimaufrey: Being quite interesting wins points in the offbeat comedy quiz. Stephen Fry introduces Phill Jupitus, Hugh Dennis and Andy Hamilton to a gallimaufrey of gingambobs. S7 Ep9

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Guest host Victoria Coren Mitchell and panellists Joan Bakewell and Fin Taylor join team captain Paul Merton and Ian Hislop. S60 Ep7

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Taskmaster

UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Challenging each other to discern fact from fiction here are Greg Davies, Konnie Huq, Phil Tufnell and Marcus Brigstocke. With regulars Rob Brydon, David Mitchell and Lee Mack. S5 Ep5

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: With comedian David Baddiel, former MP Ed Balls, stand-up and actress Jo Brand and ex-Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt. S11 Ep1

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Mad Dogs
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Ice Cream: Now spread out and separated across Belize, the guys must weigh their personal desires against those of their friends' lives to recover the missing money and save Joel. S1 Ep7

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Mad Dogs
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Broodstock: A charismatic entrepreneur promises to bring the boys home if they complete a mysterious and dangerous mission involving Lawrence, Jesus, and the duffel bag full of Euros. S1 Ep8

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Judge Romesh
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The court sees some celebrity scandal, as Blue stars Duncan James and Anthony Costa clash over a Brit Award. Two passionate siblings battle over some pooey property. S1 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Ho Chi Minh Trail: Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck have to dodge unexploded bombs as they tackle the Ho Chi Minh Trail, a mazy network of dangerous roads through Laos and Vietnam. S2 Ep2

UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Cadiz: Rick's series of culinary city breaks continues with a trip to the historic city of Cadiz in southern Spain, which is renowned for its fresh tuna and manzanilla. S1 Ep8

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guest panellists Denise Lewis, Richard Osman, Robert Rinder and Katherine Ryan to help determine fact from fiction. S11 Ep8

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Former winners Yasmine Akram, Stephen Mangan, Ingrid Oliver and Tom Rosenthal return to the best-selling author's tests of ingenuity and try to become a Champion of Champions. S6 Ep51

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The Pointless co-host invites Ade Adepitan, Jean Johansson, Stephen Mangan and Vikki Stone to test their general knowledge skills on his not-so-pointless game show. S4 Ep1

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: New: Will & Ralf Should Know Better
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Hobbies: Will and Ralf take hobby-hunting to extremes with ice-cold swims, full-frontal art classes, and cosplaying as cowboys in the most unlikely of places. S2 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Greats: The exalted quiz show! Jo Brand, David Mitchell, Sean Lock and Alan Davies grapple with greats including eminent host Stephen Fry and his superior line in questions. S7 Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Saving Lives At Sea
DMAXUK.uk.description: In Portrush, the crew rescue a boy in trouble after jumping off rocks. In Eastbourne, the crew help a woman who has drifted out to sea on her paddleboard. S6, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Dust Devils' critical water supply runs dry. Jacqui and Andrew find their biggest nugget so far, while the Poseidon Crew are hit by torrential rain. S6, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Stomping Grounds. Elite survivalists Matt and Gary are tested by deadly spitting cobras and territorial elephants in an African killing zone, whilst also protecting a novice. S5, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Laverock Hill Estate. The crew heads to Glenside, Pennsylvania, to salvage a huge estate. They try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more from the sprawling mansion. S9, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Price Fuller Machine Shop. The team heads over to the machine shop they bought, to see what they can find before renovating the house and determining how many new builds are needed. S9, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Blood In The Water Part 2. Jake must confront his disorderly crew, forcing him to make a tough decision. Meanwhile, Keith deals with a knife injury to one of his deckhands. S15, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winter Is Here. The coldest weather in nearly a decade threatens to crush hulls and freeze the sea. Meanwhile, a shocking mishap leaves one of the Hansens grasping for their life. S15, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Tough Inheritance. With winter intensifying, Sean faces an engine room fire. Plus, Harley offers his nephew a job as a deckhand, but the rest of the crew are not impressed. S15, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Baptism By Fire. The Cheals take on their most dangerous dig ever. The Bushmen trial a rookie to operate their exploration drill, but it doesn't go as smoothly as they'd hoped. S6, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: In Search Of Fuel. The Opal Whisperers work underground together for the first time on a legendary claim. The Mooka Boys are forced to work Leif's late father's abandoned mine. S6, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Well That Takes On Water. The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves. S6, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Diggers, Dingoes & Debt. Patrick and Kirsty search for rare Aquamarine crystals on their remote Queensland lease. Plus, Frankie & Ebriony face off against wild pigs and dingoes. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hour Of Need. Hugh and Jarrin need a miracle to keep their mining operation alive. Plus, Patrick and Kirsty are desperate for an $80,000 payday of high-grade crystals. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mookaite N Miracles. The Rockhounds need a miracle to turn their season around. Kirsty and Patrick need to find rare Ocean Kyanite crystals to have a chance of recouping their debt. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Permit delays force the Poseidon Crew off road as they try to survive the season. Plus, the Dust Devils gamble big in the hope of finding fine gold. S5, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Marcus and Linden fear a flat battery could leave them stuck in the outback for days. Plus, Shane and Russell attempt to get their season on track. S5, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A wet plant disaster threatens the Dust Devils' potentially lucrative fine gold find. Plus, the Gold Timers desperately try to turn their season around. S5, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUK.uk.description: I Can't Breathe. Larina is on the verge of losing custody of her child due to her hoarding. But when confronted to let go of her clutter, her compulsion threatens to win the battle. S3, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUK.uk.description: I'm Dumbfounded. After years of hoarding, Vickie and Jeff's marriage is at its breaking point. Now, Vickie reveals the secrets she's been keeping. Will they save their marriage? S3, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Paranormal Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nantucket Mermaid. A mermaid serenades a commercial fisherman. Plus, a shadow figure scuffles with a small dog, and a ghost blows out birthday candles. S7, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mountain Oaks Mayhem. The crew investigate rumours of dark forces at an abandoned home in La Crescenta, California. Did Charles Manson put a curse on the family who lived there? S20, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Petrified In Pahrump. The crew are in Nevada to investigate a winery that's been plagued by fatal accidents. The terrified staff claim they are being stalked by an evil presence. S20, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Axe Murder House. When Ian dares to visit The Villisca Axe Murder House, he's given a night he'll never forget. Plus, in England, Alyss goes for a regretful walk in the woods. S4, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Black Monk Ghost. A couple visits 30 East Drive, the most haunted house in the UK and the home of the demonic Black Monk. In Nottingham, Coral is in contact with otherworldly beings. S4, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Vancouver. The buyers bid on seized items and property at a police auction in Vancouver. Mark is interested in a magnetic drill while Billy and the Martins battle for vintage comics. S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: NYC Transit. The buyers are at the New York City transit auction that contains 14,000 items. Billy and the Martins compete for a Stradivarius violin possibly worth $1 million. S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bunny Money. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value? S3, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: World War Score. The Baggage Battlers are heading to the Normandy where the largest private collection of military artefacts is being put up for sale. What will they manage to buy? S3, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Golden Ticket. The baggage battlers hunt down bargains at an estate auction in Nashville, Tennessee. Will Billy be tempted by a mystery box with the inscription New Orleans, Tahiti? S3, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Swami Says. The buyers are once again on the road in search of profit, this time at an estate auction in Texas. Unique, high-end merchandise is the order of the day in Austin. S4, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Inflated Egos. The buyers return to Georgia, but this time take their auction battle out of Atlanta to the city of Commerce. Artefacts and iconic advertising pieces are up for grabs. S4, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Intergalactic Bounty. An eclectic mix of items calls to the buyers, drawing them back once again to do battle in Nashville. Items include a box full of license plates. S4, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Steal Drum. The buyers are once again in Nashville, TN. Billy, Mark, Laurence and Sally have returned to Music City Auction for all the great items that always seem to be on offer. S4, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Monster Money. The buyers are in Hollywood for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time. Items include pieces from Frankenstein and Wolf Man movies. S4, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: 10 Million Dollar Fixer Upper. Wayne and the team join a multi-shop mission get a coveted, seven-figure 1937 Bugatti ready for the most prestigious exhibition in the world. S11, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Twist And Scout. Wayne buys the motorcycle of his dreams, an all-original 1928 Indian Scout 101. Plus, he finds homes for a 1977 Mercedes 450 and an Audi R8. S11, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Let The Good Times Roll. The Cars' drummer David Robinson rolls into F40 with a restoration job on a rare 1969 De Tomaso Mangusta. How will they shake it up with this classic ride? S11, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Eclectic Avenue. During a hunt for the perfect '32 Ford, Wayne finds a vintage ice-cutting machine with a motorcycle body and engine. Plus, he uncovers a Bugatti Type 55s replica. S11, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: It's Getting Hot In Here. It's the last car show of the season. The Fairlane and the Nomad get extra attention and Dave and Kevin check out the best cars in Reno. S4, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Future Is Now. A '32 roadster bought for a client's wife is secretly shipped to Kindig It for upgrades and styling changes. A 2004 Hummer arrives for a futuristic redesign! S4, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Secret Client. Dave is tasked with finding and transforming a 1967 GTO for a secret client from South Africa. Meanwhile, Dave buys back one of his first builds, a Karman Ghia. S4, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ford Thunderbird: American Icon. A 1964 T-Bird needs pricey American parts to restore it to its former glory. And Ant gets a hand from his mate, Mike Brewer. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: Land Rover: A Favourite To Finish. Ant finds a rare 1978 Land Rover Series 3, a dream find for a Landie fanatic. But the bulkhead is riddled with rust, which could dent Ant's profit. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: NASA's Lost Treasure. Jeremy explores the loss of a NASA space capsule deep in the Atlantic. And, what is the underwater secret behind ship disappearances in the Devil's Sea? S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Loch Ness Conspiracy. Jeremy explores a revolutionary technique that could identify the Loch Ness Monster. Plus, how did a man survive for several days trapped in a shipwreck? S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Wendigo. Paranormal investigators reveal a bold new theory about the origins of the Wendigo. Are the stories of this terrifying creature with cannibalistic cravings true? S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Yeti. Experts investigate evidence suggesting that one of the world's most elusive figures, the Yeti, lives in America and may have an otherworldly source. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Into The Alien Ocean. Jess and Phil's investigation into unidentified objects off Catalina Island's coast heats up after the discovery of an extra-terrestrial underwater base. S2, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ghosts In The Canal. Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover? S2, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Terror In Appalachia. Phil and Jess venture into the Great Smoky Mountains to investigate missing hiker reports and sightings of grotesque human-like creatures. S3, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Toronto. The buyers bid against one another for lost airport items in Toronto. Mark and Billy bid for photography equipment and the Martins want a rare stamp collection. S1, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: North Carolina. The buyers are in North Carolina to bid on lost, damaged and misplaced freight. They all compete for a box of war antiques, plus they bid on a cage of unknown items. S1, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bust A Move. The Kellys must find gold to pay off their debts. Shawn moves his camp in search of the motherlode, and Vernon's diver tries to mine without a light. S10, Ep25

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hustle And Overflow. Shawn is driven to desperate measures to solve his water overflow problems. Meanwhile, Vernon follows the gold trail despite dangerous ice conditions. S10, Ep26

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Heli Hunters go for a remote camping trip in the Murchison region of Western Australia. Near Gwalia, rookie team the Brumbies, can't seem to catch a break. S9, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Return Of The Outback Beast. Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate an underwater attack. Could it be the work of a giant fresh water predator that many believed to be extinct? S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Stay Focused Or Die. The typhoon has sunk one of the boats. But as the weather clears the fleet can't dwell on the tragedy and heads back out on the treacherous seas. S5, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Put Up or Shut Up. It's the 2008 King Crab season in Dutch Harbour, so get prepared for more high drama on the treacherous and deadly Bering Sea. S5, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dragon's Teeth. Darrell focuses on a multi-million-dollar wreck tied to Sir Francis Drake. He and his team race to locate a treacherous area identified on the map as Dragon's Teeth. S2, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Real Robin Hood. Josh Gates journeys across England to uncover the true story behind Robin Hood. He explores underground tunnels and finds what may be his final resting place. S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: England's Vanished Crown Jewels. Josh is on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels. S3, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nevada Thirst. The Kondors' homestead turns to dust and Marty gambles everything to save it. The Raney's discover infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bearanoia. The Raney's are called to a failing Homestead in Colorado. Plus, Don makes a 40 mile commute each day leaving Lorinda alone and terrified of the bears and mountain lions. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Aerial Opal Spotting. The mining season is almost over and Col's crew take one last gamble. The Cooke brothers strive to save their mega opal machine and disastrous season. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Rookie Mistakes. With Dan stuck at home, Justin starts the new mining season alone. He is dealt a huge blow when their rich underground mine has been pegged by another miner. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: 5-Year Storm Part 1. A menacing storm moves into the fleet, with a rogue wave ripping steel at the Cape Caution. Jake, a freshman skipper, struggles to battle through the winds. S11, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: 5-Year Storm Part 2. A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet, and rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just to keep their heads above water. S11, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Tiger Ate My Face. Hashmot Ali had his face torn away by a tiger, and Yulianna Yussef is covered with hundreds of hairy birthmarks. Can doctors effectively treat them? S5, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ants In My Head. An Indian girl suffers from an infestation of ants in her ear canal. And, a Brazilian woman's tiny facial birthmark has become a huge tumour despite 19 surgeries. S5, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A game changing piece of equipment leads the Ferals to their biggest nugget haul of the season. Plus, Shane and Russell battle unseasonal weather. S6, Ep11

E4Plus1.uk.description: The Girl Code: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app. (S27 Ep10/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles: Bart is smitten with his new teacher and tries to impress her. Homer buys a new type of milk that has a strange effect on Bart and Lisa. (S27 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: A collection of best bits as assorted famous faces enjoy top TV, from Five Star Kitchen: Britain's Next Great Chef to The 1% Club, Hijack, Antiques Roadshow and The Yorkshire Vet. (S5 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: This time the Goggleboxers watch: The Inheritance, Long Lost Family, Unknown Number: The High School Catfish, The Yorkshire Vet, Dish It Out and Street Cops: Catching the Yobs. (S26 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: What do the Goggleboxers think of MAFS UK, Slow Horses, Win Win, Made in Chelsea, Dolphins Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Waterloo Road and Top Guns: The Next Generation? (S26 Ep4) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Can a self-confessed party animal who's looking for someone wild, a disco dancer, an ex-Playboy bunny and a biker daredevil find love in the First Dates restaurant? (S15 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Ex-market trader Dave meets Sara, whose last marriage lasted five days. Trendy Dennis and his date Chris wear matching trainers. And Ruth brings along 'Mike' - her colostomy bag. (S14 Ep5) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: This time the Goggleboxers watch: The Inheritance, Long Lost Family, Unknown Number: The High School Catfish, The Yorkshire Vet, Dish It Out and Street Cops: Catching the Yobs. (S26 Ep3) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: What do the Goggleboxers think of MAFS UK, Slow Horses, Win Win, Made in Chelsea, Dolphins Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Waterloo Road and Top Guns: The Next Generation? (S26 Ep4) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with All the Darts: Hapless Liam wants his greatest passion to take flight with a darts-inspired wedding. Will his arrows extravaganza hit the target?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One at a Music Festival: Jake wants the ultimate wedding knees-up, but bride-to-be Rosie dreams of a more intimate affair. Will this festival wedding prove to be a headliner?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
E4Plus1.uk.description: Dodger sets out to prove that Smithy is corrupt. Vicky's confidence is crushed. And McQueen family members return as a series of 'what if' scenarios play out during a high-stakes situation.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents more clips, this time with a twist of karma. Featuring a fall into a river, a penalty kick back and an attempt to get dressed on a treadmill.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Up All Night: Gloria isn't happy with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Phil is suffering from kidney stones. (S1 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the Same Paige: Phil's real estate class will be cancelled if any more students drop it. So he turns on his charm to try to convince one student, Paige, to stay. (S10 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?: When Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview, everyone tries too hard, which jeopardises her chances. (S10 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Putting Down Roots: Dede's husband Jerry comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they know what to do with. (S10 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree. (S10 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with the Wannabe King: Harry wants to be king for the day. But bride Charlotte wants something low key. Will this be Harry's crowning moment or will it be 'off with his head'?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One in an Old Mine: It's high noon for impulsive groom Steve as he plans a cliff-hanger of a Wild West wedding for Leona. Will Steve's nuptials on a bridge prove a swinging success?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon Returns: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved? (S2 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working. (S4 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help? (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Down City: Gordon Ramsay tries to save struggling restaurant Down City in Providence, Rhode Island. But tough-talking owner Abby refuses to take advice from anyone. (S4 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Home Alone 3
E4Plus1.uk.description: (1997) Comedy sequel starring Alex D. Linz as a resourceful boy who's stranded at home with chickenpox when a top-secret military microchip comes his way. Can he keep it safe from crooks?

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer the Vigilante: Homer sets up a chaotic vigilante group to combat one-man crime spree Molloy (guest star Sam Neill). (S5 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart Gets Famous: Thanks to his new catchphrase, 'I didn't do it', Bart becomes famous, getting his own TV series and releasing a range of merchandise. (S5 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer and Apu: When Apu loses the Kwik-E-Mart, he moves in with the Simpsons. And then Homer joins him on a pilgrimage to the first ever Kwik-E-Mart, in the Himalayas. (S5 Ep13/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey: Lisa decides Malibu Stacey dolls set a bad example to girls, so she pleads with their creator, Stacy Lovell (Kathleen Turner), to design an alternative. (S5 Ep14/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: New: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - Full Heart, Empty Pool: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it. (S36 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: New: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - Estranger Things: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future. (S36 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Terminator Genisys
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2015) Sci-fi thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke. Part five of the franchise follows Sarah Connor in an alternate timeline to the previous movies, as she takes on Skynet.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers tune in to Bridgerton, SAS: Who Dares Wins, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Made in Chelsea, and the news on Rishi Sunak and the Partygate scandal. (S19 Ep9) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, Britain's Got Talent, The Thief, His Wife and the Canoe, Romeo and Duet, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Roar, and Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over. (S19 Ep10) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction
E4Plus1.uk.description: Make-up artist Callie from Glasgow wants a man who's proud to have her on his arm, while part-time life model Luca from Edinburgh is looking for his perfect muse to sketch. (S9 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers tune in to Bridgerton, SAS: Who Dares Wins, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Made in Chelsea, and the news on Rishi Sunak and the Partygate scandal. (S19 Ep9) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, Britain's Got Talent, The Thief, His Wife and the Canoe, Romeo and Duet, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Roar, and Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over. (S19 Ep10) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
E4Plus1.uk.description: Dodger sets out to prove that Smithy is corrupt. Vicky's confidence is crushed. And McQueen family members return as a series of 'what if' scenarios play out during a high-stakes situation. [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Vicky takes drastic measures as her insecurities deepen. At breaking point, Nancy makes a difficult decision. And there's a race against time when a threat puts lives in danger...

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: With the McQueen house in lockdown, original family members return, as a series of 'what if' scenarios play out during a high-stakes situation. And John Paul makes a life-changing decision.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Peter's: Gordon visits Peter's Italian Restaurant in New York, where the peace of Long Island is shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family who run the place. (S1 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Mixing Bowl: Bijou New York diner The Mixing Bowl is haemorrhaging money thanks to manager Mike's out-of-control marketing plans. Can Gordon get things back on track? (S1 Ep2) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Circle of Driving Again: When Murray insists that Adam must have driving lessons, the family learn something new about Pops. Barry visits Erica at college. (S5 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Parents Just Don't Understand: Adam and Barry write a song but don't get the reaction they were expecting from Murray. Beverly repeatedly calls Erica at college. (S5 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Sketchy Area: Phil finds a new career after visiting Luke's college. Mitch's new case as an assistant DA is marred by an unflattering courtroom sketch by the resident artist. (S10 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Torn Between Two Lovers: Haley struggles when she must choose between her past and present relationships. Manny returns to college while his girlfriend stays at Jay and Gloria's. (S10 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Seascape: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip, on Long Island in New York, where owner Peter has nearly a million dollars of debt. (S1 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Secret Garden: Gordon Ramsay visits a romantic French restaurant in California, where temperamental chef Michel Bardavid's complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away. (S1 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: House Mouses: Peralta insults Hitchcock and Scully's work ethic, so they try to get involved in a dangerous investigation in an attempt to prove themselves. (S3 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Adrian Pimento: The precinct gets a new detective who's been on a 12-year undercover assignment with the Mob. Gina directs a video for Captain Holt. (S3 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brother from Another Series: Sideshow Bob (guest star Kelsey Grammer) is once again released from prison, into the care of his respectable brother Cecil (David Hyde Pierce). (S8 Ep16/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: My Sister, My Sitter: Lisa starts a new career as a babysitter. All is going well, until Marge and Homer employ her to look after Bart and Maggie... (S8 Ep17/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: MTV Spring Break: Hoping to enjoy a genuine spring break experience, Erica and Barry pay a visit to Pops in Florida, but the jaunt isn't what they expected. (S5 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Flashy Little Flashdancer: Beverly takes up dancing. The kids are not impressed. Adam attempts to act cooler than Emmy's handsome new date. (S5 Ep19)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: We Need to Talk About Lily: Phil thinks he's found Pepper's dream home. Mitch and Cam get invited to an exclusive event. (S10 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: SuperShowerBabyBowl: Jay is hosting a Super Bowl party, while Claire hosts a baby shower for Haley - and they're both at Jay's house. What could possibly go wrong? (S10 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Coral Palms (Part 3/3): The team go on a road trip to help Peralta and Holt take down crime boss Jimmy Figgis but their plan is hindered by an unforeseen injury. (S4 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Night Shift: Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk. (S4 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Treehouse of Horror XI: Homer receives a very scary horoscope, and Bart and Lisa are banished to the forest, where they find a house made of gingerbread... (S12 Ep1/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Tale of Two Springfields: When class rivalries split Springfield in two, Homer becomes mayor of 'New Springfield'. (S12 Ep2/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gemma's determined to uncover the truth behind her dad's behaviour. Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. And a newly released resident returns to seek revenge...

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Much Apu About Something: Apu loses his job when his shop is rebranded as a health food market aimed at a hip young crowd. Bart's latest prank has terrible consequences. (S27 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Jeremy Paxman, Joe Wilkinson, Sally Lindsay and Georgia Toffolo make characterful biscuits and a cake in the shape of their favourite hobby. (S2 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored and Formula 1: Drive to Survive. (S19 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof and Great British History Hunters. (S19 Ep12)

Film4.uk.title: The Last Stand
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1989) Fantasy horror with Julian Sands and Richard E Grant. Using magic, an evil warlock flees to 80s LA from the olde-worlde. Can he unmake creation before a witch-finder tracks him down?

Film4.uk.title: Happy Death Day 2U
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Comedy slasher sequel with Jessica Rothe. Following the accidental creation of a time loop, our hero - Tree - has another murderer to stop. Déjà vu anyone?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Son of Robin Hood
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

Film4.uk.title: The Perfect Catch
Film4.uk.description: (2005) Comedy. Ben (Jimmy Fallon) must choose between his two loves: Lindsey (Drew Barrymore) and the Boston Red Sox baseball team. Based on Nick Hornby's novel Fever Pitch.

Film4.uk.title: The Call of the Wild
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

Film4.uk.title: Mrs Doubtfire
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

Film4.uk.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in...

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4.uk.title: Late Night with the Devil

ITV1North.uk.title: New: James Martin's Saturday Morning
ITV1North.uk.description: James cooks up a feast for singer Freya Ridings - and sports presenter Jill Douglas - while tasting mouth-watering recipes from chefs Sat Bains and Dipna and Gulu Anand.

ITV1North.uk.title: New: Ainsley's Taste of the Bahamas
ITV1North.uk.description: Roots and Rhythm: Afro-Caribbean Soul: Ainsley Harriott explores the roots of Bahamian history while also making a hearty island veggie stew pot and a warm Johnny cake. S1 Ep8

ITV1North.uk.title: ITV News
ITV1North.uk.description: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

ITV1North.uk.title: Six Nations: England v Ireland
ITV1North.uk.description: Mark Pougatch is joined by Jonny Wilkinson, Brian O'Driscoll and Rory Best at the Allianz Stadium, Twickenham as Andy Farrell's Ireland take on Steve Borthwick's England.

ITV1North.uk.title: ITV Evening News
ITV1North.uk.description: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

ITV1North.uk.description: The latest news and weather from around the North West.

ITV1North.uk.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
ITV1North.uk.description: One Chaser is all that stands between actress Catherine Tyldesley, entrepreneur Levi Roots, comedian Chris McCausland, rock legend Rick Wakeman and thousands of pounds for charity.

ITV1North.uk.title: New: Wheel of Fortune
ITV1North.uk.description: Graham Norton welcomes firefighter Kerrie, financial advisor Richard, and account manager Ciaran as they tackle tough puzzles and face the Wheel for a chance to win 50,000 pounds. S3 Ep7

ITV1North.uk.title: New: Britain's Got Talent
ITV1North.uk.description: The show returns with more hopefuls welcomed by the award-winning Ant & Dec before showing their talents to judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and new addition KSI. S19 Ep1

ITV1North.uk.title: New: The 1% Club
ITV1North.uk.description: Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.

ITV1North.uk.title: New: The Jonathan Ross Show
ITV1North.uk.description: Jonathan's guests this time include star of Grey's Anatomy and Ferrari Patrick Dempsey, comedian, actor and BRITs host Jack Whitehall, and multi-award-winning musician Self Esteem. S23 Ep3

ITV1North.uk.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
ITV1North.uk.description: Tom Allen celebrates TV cock-ups featuring Alexander Armstrong, Richard Ayoade, Rob Beckett, Coleen Nolan, the cast of Heartstopper and more of the nation's favourite stars.

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. Paramedic Rochers fights to save a DIY mechanic crushed by his own car. S1 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
UAndW.uk.description: Zak treats a 90-year-old woman after paramedics gave her CPR, Tristan gets a diagnosis spot-on, and Christine has a patient with an alarming combination of symptoms. S1 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
UAndW.uk.description: Family Ties: Louis examines how families can be the cause of our deepest pain, and catches up with contributors from Trans Kids and A Different Brain to see how their lives have changed. S1 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Talking To Anorexia
UAndW.uk.description: Louis meets patients at two of London's largest eating disorder facilities, following them through a daily routine of scheduled eating, weigh-ins and group therapy.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Mel B, Josh Widdicombe, Osi Umenyiora, Kerry Godliman, Jordan North, Rosemary Shrager and Dr Hilary Jones try to help the contestants win big. S2 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Trial and Error: Part 2: Norris's housemate Dan Cox falls under suspicion in the rape case when evidence reveals he once covered for his friend to help him avoid harassment charges. S27 Ep65

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Funny Money: A shoplifter is found in possession of forged bank notes and Gina is tempted to bend the rules in a bid to trace the mastermind behind the operation. S27 Ep66

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Appropriate Force: Callum realises a bank job resembles a case he once solved, and the prime suspect still holds a grudge against him - not least because they were love rivals. S27 Ep67

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: An Honour to Serve: Part 1: A stabbing victim accuses the husband of a woman he once had a brief affair with, but forensic evidence reveals his wounds are self-inflicted. S27 Ep68

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: An Honour to Serve: Part 2: As stalker Jake Quinn holds Smithy and two schoolgirls hostage, a shot rings out and Gina fears her last day with the Sun Hill team will be marred by tragedy. S27 Ep69

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep121

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep122

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: A rescue operation is launched after a DIY enthusiast leaves a trap-door open and his partner falls into the cellar. A student captures his dad's mountain bike accident on camera. S3 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: On Hull docks, the team are called in after asylum seekers are discovered in a cargo container. Plus, there's a massive factory fire and firefighters battle to find workers. S4 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: There's a serious crash in the fog and the team battle to free a trucker trapped in his cab by twisted metal. A bizarre accident in a soft play centre leads to a suspected spinal injury. S4 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: A biker riding without a helmet crashes and the team launch a desperate fight to save his life as his horrified family look on. A man barricades himself into a canal boat. S4 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: Paediatric nurse Mahbuba is called to an emergency with a toddler gasping for breath, while military nurse Scott treats a man after a heart attack. S1 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: Cardiac nurse Rebecca cares for a man whose organs are failing, while midwife Amy delivers a high-risk mother's late baby. S1 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The hilarious sketch series with oddball characters played by the talented comedy actress. Sketches this time include Paul and Sam and the delightfully foul-mouthed Nan. S1 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The fifth in the hit comedy sketch series featuring a gallery of characters from the 'Doctor Who' actress. Here, the foul-mouthed granny discovers a pound shop. S1 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The last in the first series of the award-winning comedy sketch show co-written and performed by the versatile comedy actress. Are you bovvered? S1 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: Ambulance Australia
UAndW.uk.description: Australia's busiest ambulance service are called to a work site explosion, a motor vehicle accident, and a young boy getting himself trapped in his toy. S2 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Talking To Anorexia
UAndW.uk.description: Louis meets patients at two of London's largest eating disorder facilities, following them through a daily routine of scheduled eating, weigh-ins and group therapy.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: The Most Hated Family in America
UAndW.uk.description: Wry observer of oddballs Louis Theroux turns his attention to the Phelps clan who picket America, promoting an intolerance of gay life.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Three contestants hope to answer their way to a fortune, guided by Bill Bailey, Scarlett Moffatt, William Hanson, Big Zuu, John Bercow, Denise Lewis and Anna Richardson. S2 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Sitting Targets: Family sitcom. Susan decides that Ben should spend more time with Michael in case he turns into another Nick. Janey leaves the grandparents to babysit Kenzo. S4 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Loco Parentis: Putting the 'dysfunctional' into 'family' is the domestic comedy with the madcap Harpers. Ben and Susan have to go back to school for parenting classes. S4 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Canary Cage: The Harpers get a free holiday to Lanzarote, and even though Ben loses his luggage, he is happy enough to use his brand new digital camera as much as possible. S4 Ep11

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: May the Best Man Win: Are all families this barmy? It's the ratings-topping domestic sitcom with the Harpers. Abi's father asks Ben to be his best man - a bad move! S4 Ep12

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: It's a Window Filled Life: Fun with the Harpers. Roger's got a disease, Nick gets to work with an 18ft python and Michael plays with a rocket launcher. Just an average day, then! S4 Ep13

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: The Mummy Returns: The hugely popular family sitcom. Janey comes back home, Susan lies to the police, Michael's become born again and Abi confuses nature with naturism. S5 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep125

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Betsy & Angel: Cockapoo Betsy was hit by a van five months ago and has developed gangrene, while bite-size bijou Dogue de Bordeaux puppy Angel has a genetic deformity. S7 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Saving Noel's Dog: When Noel's beloved Border Terrier Keira is hit by a van, he must face the possibility that she may not be fixable. S7 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Inca, Nala & Charles: Anxious two-year-old Cavapoo Nala arrives for a hip replacement, and Great Dane Charles was diagnosed a spinal condition known as Wobbler Syndrome. S7 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Angus & Rocky: Goldendoodle Angus fell 20 metres and sustained nerve damage, while irrepressible Springer Spaniel Rocky's failed elbow operation has left him struggling to walk. S7 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Trigger, Fury & Raven: Police dog Trigger has crushed sciatic nerves, feisty kitten Fury has a tibia injury, and Shepadoodle Raven has double hip dysplasia. S7 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer. S10 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver. S10 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: Teenager Nathan has two twisted teeth extracted, Bob has keyhole surgery for a groin hernia, and 96-year-old Peggy entertains the team while having a growth removed from her toe. S1 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: Jonathan has a camera put inside his lungs to find out if he has cancer. James needs a knee operation so he can play with his children again, and a growth is removed from Jan's ear. S1 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
UAndW.uk.description: You Don't Do This Job for the Money: Newly-qualified Tacha is still getting to grips with the pace of a busy ward. Summah, who is registered blind, uses all her experience in theatre. S1 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Behind Bars

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Napton Junction to Aynho Wharf: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater. S6 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Aynho Wharf to Bablock Hythe: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames. S6 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. Paul and Suki take a tandem ride through the ancient woodland in the idyllic New Forest and encounter wild ponies before taking in beekeeping and archery. S2 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. The couple visit Devon - famous for its spectacular coastline, pristine beaches, cream teas and two national parks - and go on a Sherlock Holmes-inspired tour in Dartmoor. S2 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: One Ocean: Marine life around the world, from dolphins and tusk fish in a tropical coral reef to walruses struggling to cope with the impact of climate change on the polar north. S2 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: The Deep: Creatures that live in volcanic hot spots on the ocean bed, areas that reach temperatures hot enough to melt lead and which may hold the secrets behind all life on Earth. S2 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Coral Reefs: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, predators with a grasp of communication that has led scientists to conclude they're as intelligent as chimpanzees. S2 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Big Blue: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and sperm whales hunting for squid deep beneath the surface. S2 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Green Seas: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning in a rocky reef and tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in seagrass. S2 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Coasts: Footage of animals that live on the coast, including sea lions hunting for tuna, puffins bringing food back to their young, and a strange species of fish that hates water. S2 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Our Blue Planet: The impact of humans on aquatic wildlife, from albatrosses unwittingly feeding their offspring plastic to communications between animals disrupted by noise. S2 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Napton Junction to Aynho Wharf: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater. S6 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Ford Escort RS1600i: Irv takes on the restoration of an Escort RS1600i from an owner who had to give it up due to ill health, but it turns out to be a much bigger job than he imagined. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Lotus Carlton Turbo/TR7 Special Edition: Derek's winging his way to Bingley to meet a kindred spirit who's parting with his TR7 after 32 years. Paul and Charlie head to Anglesey to collect a pair of L

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Jensen Interceptor/Triumph Sprint: Derek auctions off a Jensen Interceptor and a Jensen Healey along with a one-off Wood & Pickett Triumph Dolomite Sprint. S3 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Rover 2000 SC / Triumph Spitfire: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a chicken farm barn, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer, and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored. S3 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Armstrong Siddeley/Triumph Herald: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day. S3 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: DB6/Merc Unimog Fire Engine: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir. S3 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Los Angeles to San Diego: Michael Portillo discovers the secrets of backyard oil drilling in Los Angeles and joins the locals for Mexican Independence Day. S3 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Boston to Concord: Michael Portillo visits Massachusetts General Hospital in Boston, learning how surgery was first made bearable in 1846 by a miraculous new substance. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Vauxhall Victor FB / Volvo Amazon VB: Derek picks up a five-vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors, and Paul collects a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina. S5 Ep15

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Alfa Romeo Giulia/Citroen 2CV6: Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV, before he is off admiring the treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage. S6 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Vickers: The role played by engineering giant Vickers during the Second World War, including the development of the Spitfire and how the Royal Navy recovered from losing so many warships. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: The Great War In Numbers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Descent Into Hell: The first day of the Somme Offensive was the blackest day in the British Army's history. The shocking numbers are revealed as the war retrospective revisits 1916. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Helmingham Hall 2: The team returns to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, a Tudor manor house where finds include a historic document signed by Elizabeth I and an extravagant brooch from Sweden. S40 Ep12

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Newcastle Civic Centre 1: Fiona Bruce presents from Newcastle's Civic Centre, where artefacts to be valued include an impressive crossbow and a collection of plans for RMS Mauretania. S40 Ep13

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Lotus Esprit/MG TF/ERF Lorry: On the way to pick up two lovely '70s Lotus sports cars, Derek takes to the skies for his first ever helicopter flight in a 1967 Bell 47 chopper. S9 Ep10

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Moskvitch: Dave's drawn to a Fiat Uno 45 in '1970's beige', with 36,000 miles on the clock. S9 Ep11

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Vickers: The role played by engineering giant Vickers during the Second World War, including the development of the Spitfire and how the Royal Navy recovered from losing so many warships. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: The second leg of Simon Reeve's journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful island of Barbados to St Vincent and the Grenadines, Venezuela and Colombia. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Coral Triangle: Simon Reeve voyages across the Coral Triangle in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Kenya to Somaliland: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Lotus Esprit/MG TF/ERF Lorry: On the way to pick up two lovely '70s Lotus sports cars, Derek takes to the skies for his first ever helicopter flight in a 1967 Bell 47 chopper. S9 Ep10

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Moskvitch: Dave's drawn to a Fiat Uno 45 in '1970's beige', with 36,000 miles on the clock. S9 Ep11

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Crooked Fences: Saucy wartime sitcom that's a big hit across Europe. Cafe Rene is the venue for a clandestine deal involving the infamous Fallen Madonna and a cuckoo clock weight. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bond Bugs/Westfalia/Renault 4/MGB: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasn't seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rar

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mini Mayfair/NSU Quickly: In the 100th episode, Derek heads to Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack deals with a Mini Mayfair stuck in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctione

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Before The Crown: Exploring the honeymoon home of a young princess and grand monuments designed by the most notorious dictator of the twentieth century. S8 Ep12

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Megalomaniac's Paradise: Exploring a once-lavish palace in Iraq - the Sathorn Unique - an epic ghost tower in Thailand, and a former sports stadium in Georgia in the United States. S9 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Krupp: The story behind the Krupp company, who were responsible for the manufacture of two of Germany's most feared war products - the Panzer Tank and the U-boat. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Reno To The Napa Valley: Michael Portillo travels from Reno, Nevada to California's Napa County, taking to the skies over the Sierra Nevada mountain range. S3 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: San Francisco: Michael Portillo's journey's to San Francisco, where he travels through the city's streets by cable car, before heading across the bay to Sausalito. S3 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Renault 5: Gus twists Will's arm when he spies a super-rare Renault 5, but back at the workshop they realise they have one heck of a problem to fix. S2 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW Beetle: Gus and Will want to buy a VW Beetle. They locate a guy selling a project car, but fear it's almost too good to be true at less than 1,000 pounds. S2 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Reliant Kitten: Will and Gus find a Reliant Kitten that an engineer has given up on - the body is detached, it doesn't run and most of the bits it needs are in boxes in the boot. S2 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New York City to Albany: Michael Portillo follows America's iconic River Hudson, beginning at New York City's Penn Station, before sampling ale and meeting the State Senator in Albany. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Schenectady to Niagara Falls: Michael Portillo travels across New York state, discovering how General Electric also leads the way in rail technology. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Aynho Wharf to Bablock Hythe: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames. S6 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: In the third part of his journey, Simon Reeve travels through the Andes mountains from Peru to Bolivia, beginning at the world-famous ruins of Machu Pichu. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The adventurer travels to the vast white salt flats of Bolivia, through the world's greatest wetlands of Brazil's Pantanal, and on to the forested heart of Paraguay. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon Reeve travels from Chile's Atacama Desert and follows the Andes to Patagonia before ending up in most southerly inhabited region on earth, Tierra Del Fuego. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Escort RS1600i: Irv takes on the restoration of an Escort RS1600i from an owner who had to give it up due to ill health, but it turns out to be a much bigger job than he imagined. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Lotus Carlton Turbo/TR7 Special Edition: Derek's winging his way to Bingley to meet a kindred spirit who's parting with his TR7 after 32 years. Paul and Charlie head to Anglesey to collect a pair of L

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Volvo / Insight: The Bangers team can't believe their luck when a 1970s family-favourite, a Volvo 144, rolls through Mathewson with just 15,000 miles on the clock. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW Beetle / Royal Enfield Cycar: The team think they can smell profit by choosing one of the simplest cars ever built, the VW Beetle. S4 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mazda MX5 / Moto Guzzi V50: The team opt to buy one of the most affordable sports cars on the road - the Mazda MX-5. S4 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW T25 / Audi TT Quattro: The team pay over the odds for a VW Campervan, but can they hope to break even when they turn out a lovely bus for auction. S4 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mini Cooper Mk2 / MGTF: A 1969 Morris Mini Cooper MkII is totally restored by specialists. They give it the full works, which means only one thing... any chance of profit heads towards an open window.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Morgan / Raleigh Super Grifter: The Restoring Classics team set out on a Pre-War challenge with a 1939 three wheeled Morgan F4 - and aptly named Russ Storer from MG Mecca is still keen to take it on.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Berkeley to Santa Cruz: Michael Portillo visits Yosemite National Park in California, beholding its granite cliffs, sequoia trees and waterfalls. S3 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Monterey to Los Angeles: In the port of Monterey, Michael Portillo discovers the city's Spanish and Mexican heritage. S3 Ep4
